about-content-card:
I am 20 years old and currently in my third year of higher education. I've decided to combine my two greatest passions: design and programming, and turn them into my career.

I'm always on the lookout for the best designs to create, and I'm constantly working to improve my creations.

I have an insatiable thirst for knowledge, always eager to explore the latest features and programming languages.
academic-first-card-text: Winner of the Human Rights Advocacy Competition organized by the League of Human Rights, advocating for the rights of migrants. I am dedicated to prioritizing humanity in both my interactions and projects.
academic-second-card-text: Graduated with honors from a scientific high school diploma. This education instilled in me a passion for problem-solving and the discipline it entails.
academic-third-card-text: Currently a student in engineering school with a specialization in information systems. This program has taught me the fundamentals of programming and methodologies for project creation and management.
contact-text: I am looking for an internship opportunity in a company for the month of June 2024 in the Rennes region, specifically in the field of computer science. I am open to various domains and am motivated to acquire new skills to add to my repertoire. If my profile aligns with your needs, please do not hesitate to contact me.
